title: felicia abyssinica subsp. globularioides
intro: Felicia abyssinica subsp. globularioides, also known as the Globular Felicia or Blue Felicia, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Felicia abyssinica subsp. globularioides include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer and skin toner. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and creams for various health and wellness applications.
